transcript.text:
(Tzuyang was unusual since she was a baby...) Did you eat like this when you were young?
(While others gave snacks out to pigeons...)
(Baby Tzuyang)
(That's not for you)
(She would eat them off the ground... LoL)
I guess you were scolded often by your parents, heh
Like, 'Won't this girl ever stop eating?!!'
(Correct)
You are giving me a ton of headaches
(Baby Tzuyang grew to eat five whole bowls of noodles...)
(More like inhaling! LoL)
(Eating prodigy from birth) Time to heat up the rice
I'll have rice...
(Give me food! Give me!!)
Hello, everyone
Today, I'm in Hongje-dong

I actually came to Hongje-dong for udon noodles before
(Made an unfortunate retreat...) But there were too many customers, so I instead had pork belly
(Today I'll succeed!) I was actually going to...
A famous place that sells soft tofu udon
I came right as they opened
(Lines form at 12 o'clock...) Because they become full around noon
(Let's go) So I'll try eating quickly
(Located in Mapo-gu, Seoul)
(Hongje-dong Udon Noodles)
(Enter the restaurant)
Hello!
(11 o'clock, right after they opened... LOL)
(Not a single customer... LolololoL)
(Scanning the menu!) The menu...
(Let's see...) Udon noodles
(Various types of udon) Fish cake, fried tofu, sesame seeds...

Three bowls of soft tofu udon noodles
One bowl of chive udon noodles
One bowl of cold udon noodles
(Order complete) That'll be all for now
(Signature dish of the popular restaurant)
(Spicy pepper oil broth meets the chewy noodles)
(This is the soft tofu udon!)
(Bowl full of fresh chives)
(Chive udon)
(Chills right down to the bones, cold udon)
It's been 10 minutes since I got here?
(Currently, 11:10 AM) Not even 10 minutes
(Crowded...!) We're already getting customers
I've had soft tofu spicy jjamppong noodles
(Tried soft tofu ramyun too!)
But never soft tofu udon

(Enter the udon) Thank you
Cold udon
Chive udon
(Here's soft tofu udon!) Wow, that's a lot
Thank you
Bon appetit!
(Start with soft tofu udon, the main dish!) What do I eat first?
Soft tofu udon is the signature dish, let's start there
(Soft noodles?) The noodles are thinner than machine noodles
(Eyes full of expectations, lol)
Put it right on this plate
Let's try the soup!
It tastes like soft tofu stew!
(Good spicy!!) That's spicy
It heats you up in the neck
I know this

This is for curing hangovers
The noodles
They are so thin!
It's like they aren't udon noodles
Together with tofu...!
It's spicy
but not discomforting
Most hangover-cure soups
have strong spices
But this is spicy in a plain way
This is a strange dish
It's not spicy like jjamppong
More like a soft tofu stew
(Chive udon) I want to try this
Soup of the normal udon!
Wow, the chive's scent is strong, huh?!

It's good!
Both are good
Personally, I like chive udon
(Chives) The scent bursts inside your mouth
It's savory without being provocative
This is more to my taste
(Crown daisies OUT) I asked them to leave out the crown daisies
(Cucumber OUT) Also, no cucumber for cold udon
Half mungbean spouts, half noodles....?
Try the noodles
Try the tofu
(Two birds one stone) This is fine
(Come here)
This would taste good with rice, for two servings
(She found something?)
You gotta heat up the instant rice yourself

(Microwave the instant rice yourself!) It's a DIY system
This would be fine with rice, right?
If I have time, I'll get some rice!
(Next, cold udon!) Cold udon next?
(Seasoning inside the cold broth...!) This is the seasoning inside the cold udon
Taste the broth first
So cool
What's this!?
It tastes like cold noodles broth
Shake up the seasoning...!
A bit like wheat noodles!
(Shocking)
This is a perfect summer food...
(Blowing on it...?!)
Did I just blow to cool down the cold noodles?
(Shocking)

My teeth are cold
(Grandma Tzuyang, 27) This is too early for me
(Right onto the hot soft tofu noodles!) Let's eat another
I can eat a lot because it's plain
(No words necessary)
Very deep and enriching
I tasted many provocative, strong foods
(Noodles go in softly!) This is very comforting
(Two bowls CLEAR!)
(You could get full just with the soup) They gave me plenty of soup
See how much soup remains
It's giving me a brain freeze
As well as teeth freeze!
(Bring it, summer... Cold udon will be waiting...!)
(Frozen...!)
(Melt your frozen insides with chive udon!)

Personal opinion
Chive udon is delicious...!!
No wonder it's popular
The chive scent
It goes really well with the udon
The soup is fantastic!
Technically it's 'udon noodles,' cause it's thinner than udon but thicker than regular noodles!
(Not udon, but udon 'noodles' haha) I thought it was udon
Whole lotta chives
(Oh good girl, hee) I can eat chives
Not a lot, though
Do you eat them all?!
Did you really eat them all?!?
(For real?)
I was so shocked, she eats them all
But she's so thin!!

(I know... Ha)
Did you eat like this when you were young?
(Ate well since she was a wee toddler, LoL) I did eat well since I was young
Wow... Your family must've spent so much on food
(She still does, LololoL)
(The last soft tofu udon...!)
(Mukbang master fails to find the word...?) I don't know how to describe this
Like rice noodles
A bit like phở
I'm just gonna eat noodles, leave the tofu
Then eat it together with rice
(Noodles CLEAR!)
Time to heat up the rice!
(Instant rice on standby, lol)
Ma'am!
I'll have rice...

- You want more rice?!! - Yes
(I'm still not full... Heh)
Looks delicious
(Hot rice straight into the bowl...!) Dunk it in...
Those noodles
They were easy-to-digest noodles
Really comfortable on the stomach!
This is just soft tofu stew
So delicious
It goes down really well
(Soft tofu udon/rice goes down so easily...)
Other customers gave me these drinks as a gift
Thank you!
That's nice
This tastes good with rice
(Hongje-dong Udon Noodles CLEAR!) That was good

This is insane!!
I'm still not completely full...
- Oh my - Oh my
(Take photos with Tzuyang)
(So adorable, hahahaha)
Go far behind as possible
(You are so pretty too, hehe!)
Thanks to all your support
I had such a fun and great meal
Today
I had a good meal!
